filters.notes: 1998-09-02 encoded as days_from_civil; ~97% rows pass; table sorted ascending so tail blocks pruned by zone map

data_structures.block_skip: zone_map(lineitem_shipdate_zonemap) — skip block if min_val > 10471; early-terminate once min_val > threshold (sorted order)
data_structures.aggregation: direct_array[6] — Acc[rflag_code * 2 + lstatus_code]; thread-local per worker, merged after scan

parallelism.notes: Each thread claims blocks from a shared atomic counter; maintains thread-local Acc[6]; final merge is O(6 * nthreads)

indexes.purpose: skip_blocks — skip block b if zone_map[b].min_val > 10471; early-terminate on first skipped block due to ascending sort order

aggregation.merge: sum thread-local Acc[6] arrays element-wise; O(6 * nthreads)

output.sort_strategy: std::sort on 6-entry result array keyed by (returnflag_string, linestatus_string) loaded from dict files
